title: CONTRIBUTING.md: fix project paths
body:
The paths to the local libpod tree where missing the `./src` part which ultimately
lead to compilation errors.

Reported in #podman on IRC.
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

This PR has been created via the web interface and I didn't manage to push to it, so I opened https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/3511.
